Storage
BRIDGE.
Storage

Storage with murals on the doors.

Same security. Same access. Better vibes. Every unit sits inside a working arts facility — because your stuff deserves better than a beige hallway.

The Nook

5' × 5' · 25 sq ft
$85/mo

The Room

5' × 10' · 50 sq ft
$145/mo

The Studio

10' × 10' · 100 sq ft
$225/mo

The Workshop

10' × 20' · 200 sq ft
$375/mo

Every unit includes

Access to outdoor gathering space. Artists lounge & library privileges. Event invites. A mural on your door. Community, not just a padlock.
